stages.name: group_mean_subtract
stages.description: Compute per-group mean and broadcast-subtract from input. Output = input - group_mean.
stages.reference_body: return input_tensor - input_tensor.reshape(N, num_groups, C // num_groups, HW).mean(dim=[2, 3], keepdim=True).expand(N, num_groups, C // num_groups, HW).reshape(N, 1, HW, C)
stages.extra_setup:
G = 2
    N, _, HW, C = shape
    gamma = torch.randn(1, 1, 1, C, dtype=torch.bfloat16)
    beta = torch.randn(1, 1, 1, C, dtype=torch.bfloat16)

stages.name: normalize
stages.description: Add variance computation and full normalization without affine transform.
stages.reference_body:
x_r = input_tensor.reshape(N, num_groups, C // num_groups, HW)
    m = x_r.mean(dim=[2, 3], keepdim=True)
    v = x_r.var(dim=[2, 3], unbiased=False, keepdim=True)
    return ((input_tensor - m.expand_as(x_r).reshape(N, 1, HW, C)) / torch.sqrt(v.expand_as(x_r).reshape(N, 1, HW, C) + eps))
stages.extra_setup:
G = 2
    N, _, HW, C = shape
    eps = 1e-5
    gamma = torch.randn(1, 1, 1, C, dtype=torch.bfloat16)
    beta = torch.randn(1, 1, 1, C, dtype=torch.bfloat16)

stages.name: affine
stages.description: Apply per-channel gamma and beta. Full group_norm output.
stages.reference_body:
x_r = input_tensor.reshape(N, num_groups, C // num_groups, HW)
    m = x_r.mean(dim=[2, 3], keepdim=True)
    v = x_r.var(dim=[2, 3], unbiased=False, keepdim=True)
    normed = (input_tensor - m.expand_as(x_r).reshape(N, 1, HW, C)) / torch.sqrt(v.expand_as(x_r).reshape(N, 1, HW, C) + eps)
    return gamma * normed + beta
stages.extra_setup:
G = 2
    N, _, HW, C = shape
    eps = 1e-5
    gamma = torch.randn(1, 1, 1, C, dtype=torch.bfloat16)
    beta = torch.randn(1, 1, 1, C, dtype=torch.bfloat16)

failure_history.suggested_action: Check helper parameters against design. Verify CB data format and tile counts. Compare tolerance values — intermediate stages may need looser tolerances.
